Møre, on the other hand, was a region inhabited solely by humans, ruled by a kingdom with a long lineage called Ravndal. Five hundred years ago, the kingdom had been invaded by giants from Trøndelag, specifically the village of Auenstein, seeking to expand their dominion. The king, utterly defeated and unable to win the battle, struck a deal with the leader of the invading giants to stop the slaughter of his people.
